Operation 'getSearchMonitors' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is repetitive and lacks specificity. Improved version clarifies what monitoring details are returned, distinguishes between retrieving status vs. configuration, and explains the use case for AI agents.

data.current_description: Get monitored search details
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve monitoring status for a search
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current monitoring configuration and status for a specific search. Returns monitoring details including whether monitoring is active, monitoring start date, and any recent changes detected. Use this to check the active monitoring state of a search.
data.reasoning: Original description is repetitive and lacks specificity. Improved version clarifies what monitoring details are returned, distinguishes between retrieving status vs. configuration, and explains the use case for AI agents.

message: Operation 'updateSearchMonitors' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is vague about what 'update' means. Improved version clarifies the start/stop action, explains the side effects (change tracking and notifications), specifies the request schema usage, and indicates the response content for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Update monitored search details (start/stop monitoring)
data.summary_suggestion: Start or stop monitoring a search
data.description_suggestion: Enables or disables continuous monitoring for a specific search. Accepts an UpdateMonitorRequest body to control monitoring state. When monitoring is started, the system will track changes to the search results and entities. When stopped, monitoring ceases and no further change notifications will be generated. Returns the updated monitoring configuration.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what 'update' means. Improved version clarifies the start/stop action, explains the side effects (change tracking and notifications), specifies the request schema usage, and indicates the response content for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'acknowledgeMonitorChanges' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks context about what 'acknowledge' accomplishes. Improved version explains the side effect (clearing notification state), clarifies the workflow (review then acknowledge), and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation in a monitoring workflow.

data.current_summary: Acknowledge changes to a monitored search
data.current_description: Acknowledge changes to a monitored search
data.summary_suggestion: Mark detected search changes as acknowledged
data.description_suggestion: Marks detected changes in a monitored search as acknowledged by the user. This operation records that the user has reviewed changes to search results or entities and clears the change notification state. Use this after reviewing monitoring alerts to reset the change detection status. Returns confirmation of the acknowledgment.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks context about what 'acknowledge' accomplishes. Improved version explains the side effect (clearing notification state), clarifies the workflow (review then acknowledge), and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation in a monitoring workflow.

message: Operation 'createComment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is minimal and doesn't explain the purpose or return value. Improved version clarifies the two comment types, explains the use case in compliance context, specifies request schema usage, and indicates what is returned for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Create a comment (comment on search or comment on entity)
data.summary_suggestion: Add a comment to a search or entity
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new comment attached to a search or a specific entity within that search. Accepts a CreateCommentRequest body specifying the comment text and optional entity reference. Comments are used for audit trails, compliance notes, and team collaboration. Returns the created comment object with metadata including timestamp and author.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and doesn't explain the purpose or return value. Improved version clarifies the two comment types, explains the use case in compliance context, specifies request schema usage, and indicates what is returned for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'detachTag' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too brief and doesn't explain the side effects or purpose. Improved version clarifies the singular tag removal (not bulk), explains the impact on search organization, indicates the response type, and provides context for when to use this operation in a compliance workflow.

data.current_description: Detach tags from search
data.summary_suggestion: Remove a tag from a search
data.description_suggestion: Removes a specific tag from a search, disassociating the tag label from that search record. This operation modifies the search's tag metadata and affects search filtering and categorization. Returns confirmation of the tag removal. Use this to update search classifications or clean up outdated tags.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and doesn't explain the side effects or purpose. Improved version clarifies the singular tag removal (not bulk), explains the impact on search organization, indicates the response type, and provides context for when to use this operation in a compliance workflow.

message: Operation 'getUsers' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are too generic. Added specificity about what is returned (user objects with specific fields), authentication requirement, and use case context to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Get a list of users in your account
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all users in your account. Returns user objects containing user identifiers, names, email addresses, and account roles. Requires authentication. Useful for account management and user administration tasks.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic. Added specificity about what is returned (user objects with specific fields), authentication requirement, and use case context to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'listSearches' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks detail about pagination, filtering capabilities, and what fields are returned. Added domain context (AML/compliance), parameter information, and return value details to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Get a list of your previous searches
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of your previous AML/compliance searches. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Returns search metadata including search ID, creation date, status, and result counts. Useful for reviewing search history and monitoring compliance activities.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about pagination, filtering capabilities, and what fields are returned. Added domain context (AML/compliance), parameter information, and return value details to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'createSearch' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to clarify return values (search object with ID and timestamp) and side effects (search is persisted for future reference and monitoring). Added domain context for clarity.

data.current_description: Create a new search by POSTing search terms, parameters and filters. By default creating a search will pull the first 100 results from the database.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new AML/compliance search with specified search terms, parameters, and filters. By default, returns the first 100 results from the database. Returns a search object with unique search ID, creation timestamp, and initial results. The search is persisted in your account for future reference and monitoring.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to clarify return values (search object with ID and timestamp) and side effects (search is persisted for future reference and monitoring). Added domain context for clarity.

message: Operation 'getSearch' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original description is vague about what 'overview' contains. Added specificity about returned fields (status, creation date, assigned user, result count, filters) and clarified the distinction from getSearchDetails to help AI agents choose the correct operation.

data.current_description: Get an overview of one of your searches
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves metadata and overview information for a specific search by ID. Returns search details including status, creation date, assigned user, result count, and filter parameters. Does not return full search results; use getSearchDetails for complete result data.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what 'overview' contains. Added specificity about returned fields (status, creation date, assigned user, result count, filters) and clarified the distinction from getSearchDetails to help AI agents choose the correct operation.

message: Operation 'updateSearch' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs clarification about partial update support, return value (updated search object), and side effects (immediate system reflection). This helps AI agents understand the operation's behavior and effects.

data.current_description: Update details of one of your searches (e.g., assigned user, status)
data.description_suggestion: Updates metadata of an existing search including assigned user, status, and other search properties. Supports partial updates - only provided fields are modified. Returns the updated search object with all current metadata. Changes are immediately reflected in the system.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs clarification about partial update support, return value (updated search object), and side effects (immediate system reflection). This helps AI agents understand the operation's behavior and effects.

message: Operation 'getSearchDetails' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description lacks specificity about what 'full results' contains (entities, hits, risk assessments, compliance flags). Added domain context (AML screening) and clarified the relationship to createSearch operation to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this endpoint.

data.current_description: Get full search results of one of your searches
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves complete search results for a specific search including all matched entities, hit details, and risk assessments. Returns detailed entity information with compliance flags, match status, and risk levels. Use this operation to review full AML screening results after creating a search.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks specificity about what 'full results' contains (entities, hits, risk assessments, compliance flags). Added domain context (AML screening) and clarified the relationship to createSearch operation to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this endpoint.

message: Operation 'updateSearchEntities' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs clarification about what is returned (updated entity objects) and side effects (changes persist and affect future monitoring). Added domain context (compliance status, risk assessment) for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Update entities details (e.g., is_whitelisted, risk_level, match_status) of one of your searches
data.description_suggestion: Updates compliance status and risk assessment details for entities within a search. Modifiable fields include is_whitelisted, risk_level, and match_status. Returns the updated entity objects with new values. Changes are persisted and reflected in future search reviews and monitoring activities.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs clarification about what is returned (updated entity objects) and side effects (changes persist and affect future monitoring). Added domain context (compliance status, risk assessment) for better AI agent interpretability.

Operation 'getSearchMonitors' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is repetitive and lacks specificity. Improved version clarifies what monitoring details are returned, distinguishes between retrieving status vs. configuration, and explains the use case for AI agents.

data.current_description: Get monitored search details
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve monitoring status for a search
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current monitoring configuration and status for a specific search. Returns monitoring details including whether monitoring is active, monitoring start date, and any recent changes detected. Use this to check the active monitoring state of a search.
data.reasoning: Original description is repetitive and lacks specificity. Improved version clarifies what monitoring details are returned, distinguishes between retrieving status vs. configuration, and explains the use case for AI agents.

message: Operation 'updateSearchMonitors' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is vague about what 'update' means. Improved version clarifies the start/stop action, explains the side effects (change tracking and notifications), specifies the request schema usage, and indicates the response content for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Update monitored search details (start/stop monitoring)
data.summary_suggestion: Start or stop monitoring a search
data.description_suggestion: Enables or disables continuous monitoring for a specific search. Accepts an UpdateMonitorRequest body to control monitoring state. When monitoring is started, the system will track changes to the search results and entities. When stopped, monitoring ceases and no further change notifications will be generated. Returns the updated monitoring configuration.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what 'update' means. Improved version clarifies the start/stop action, explains the side effects (change tracking and notifications), specifies the request schema usage, and indicates the response content for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'acknowledgeMonitorChanges' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks context about what 'acknowledge' accomplishes. Improved version explains the side effect (clearing notification state), clarifies the workflow (review then acknowledge), and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation in a monitoring workflow.

data.current_summary: Acknowledge changes to a monitored search
data.current_description: Acknowledge changes to a monitored search
data.summary_suggestion: Mark detected search changes as acknowledged
data.description_suggestion: Marks detected changes in a monitored search as acknowledged by the user. This operation records that the user has reviewed changes to search results or entities and clears the change notification state. Use this after reviewing monitoring alerts to reset the change detection status. Returns confirmation of the acknowledgment.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks context about what 'acknowledge' accomplishes. Improved version explains the side effect (clearing notification state), clarifies the workflow (review then acknowledge), and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation in a monitoring workflow.

message: Operation 'createComment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is minimal and doesn't explain the purpose or return value. Improved version clarifies the two comment types, explains the use case in compliance context, specifies request schema usage, and indicates what is returned for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Create a comment (comment on search or comment on entity)
data.summary_suggestion: Add a comment to a search or entity
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new comment attached to a search or a specific entity within that search. Accepts a CreateCommentRequest body specifying the comment text and optional entity reference. Comments are used for audit trails, compliance notes, and team collaboration. Returns the created comment object with metadata including timestamp and author.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and doesn't explain the purpose or return value. Improved version clarifies the two comment types, explains the use case in compliance context, specifies request schema usage, and indicates what is returned for better AI agent understanding.

Original description is too brief and doesn't explain the side effects or purpose. Improved version clarifies the singular tag removal (not bulk), explains the impact on search organization, indicates the response type, and provides context for when to use this operation in a compliance workflow.

data.current_description: Detach tags from search
data.summary_suggestion: Remove a tag from a search
data.description_suggestion: Removes a specific tag from a search, disassociating the tag label from that search record. This operation modifies the search's tag metadata and affects search filtering and categorization. Returns confirmation of the tag removal. Use this to update search classifications or clean up outdated tags.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and doesn't explain the side effects or purpose. Improved version clarifies the singular tag removal (not bulk), explains the impact on search organization, indicates the response type, and provides context for when to use this operation in a compliance workflow.

data.current_description: Create a new search by POSTing search terms, parameters and filters. By default creating a search will pull the first 100 results from the database.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new AML/compliance search with specified search terms, parameters, and filters. By default, returns the first 100 results from the database. Returns a search object with unique search ID, creation timestamp, and initial results. The search is persisted in your account for future reference and monitoring.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to clarify return values (search object with ID and timestamp) and side effects (search is persisted for future reference and monitoring). Added domain context for clarity.
